_comment: Prompts for Replicate Flux 1.1 Pro hero-image generation. One entry per slug. Each prompt is tuned to the poem's emotional core in the same atmospheric / single-subject style as the existing three hero images. Keep prompts in natural-language Flux form, end with 'no text, no words'.
i-met-a-man: A solitary craftsman silhouetted in the warm glow of a dusty workshop window at late afternoon, golden light streaming through floating dust motes, painterly cinematic, intimate and quiet, no text, no words
pull-of-the-universe: A lone figure standing on wet sand watching the ocean at sunrise, soft pastel sky reflecting on the wet beach, painterly atmospheric, vast and contemplative, no text, no words
rhymes-and-beats: A worn pair of cleats on cracked urban pavement, dramatic side-lit dusk light, gritty cinematic painterly, no text, no words
presence-in-the-present: A single figure seated cross-legged at the edge of a misty cliff at golden hour, warm enveloping light, dreamy painterly, serene, no text, no words
look-into-my-eyes: Reflection of a person's contemplative face in still water at twilight, ripples just settling, painterly atmospheric, melancholic and introspective, no text, no words
i-wish-i-could-see: A lone silhouette on a quiet hilltop beneath a vast star-filled night sky with a faint Milky Way, atmospheric cinematic painterly, contemplative wonder, no text, no words
i-knew-it-was-you: Two distant figures approaching each other on a misty country road at dawn, soft pastel light, dreamy painterly recognition, no text, no words
